testcase.name: getCompleteVideoInfo
getChannelVideos
getVideo
testcase.system-out: Video { id=35602, name='OpenAndroidInstaller demo: Install LineageOS on Google Pixel 3a', description='In this demo video, I showcase how the OpenAndroidInstaller 0.4.0-beta works. The tool is used to unlock the bootloader of the Google Pixel 3a (sargo) and then install LineageOS on it.', publishedAt='2023-02-25T17:39:14.444Z', account=Account { id=9737, name='openandroidinstaller_dev', url='https://peertube.tv/accounts/openandroidinstaller_dev', avatars=[aiss.peertubeminer.model.peertube.Avatar@1248f83[fileUrl=https://peertube.tv/lazy-static/avatars/68876988-120c-43fa-8794-34220ac0a356.png], aiss.peertubeminer.model.peertube.Avatar@5c28009f[fileUrl=https://peertube.tv/lazy-static/avatars/92da9f8c-7f38-4f72-bdee-46740da7c115.png], aiss.peertubeminer.model.peertube.Avatar@19b0a9f2[fileUrl=https://peertube.tv/lazy-static/avatars/d9a01c0b-a795-4b57-9576-95174e3dc878.png], aiss.peertubeminer.model.peertube.Avatar@f4c3e9[fileUrl=https://peertube.tv/lazy-static/avatars/6717b3f4-7b20-46db-9899-de89a14751e5.png]] }, captions=null, comments=null }
